commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can address the remaining partitioner edge case without a product or ownership decision.; Needs attention: The patch is supply-chain clean, but the remaining partitioner edge case can still expose hidden model reasoning in user-facing chat delivery.; Review finding: [P2] Keep unclosed reasoning tags hidden in visible streams — src/shared/text/reasoning-tag-text-partitioner.ts:14 (sha=692aa83b4e1662158e2853b7cb2cb9ecd5e6034e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR expands assistant-text sanitization, embedded chat streaming filters, and focused tests so `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` hidden-control blocks are stripped while reasoning-prefixed visible tags are preserved.

PR surface: Source +74, Tests +173. Total +247 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: OpenAI-compatible streamed content without mirrored reasoning uses `pushVisible()`, and the partitioner’s final visible-mode recovery can emit unclosed hidden-region text as `kind: "text"`. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can address the remaining partitioner edge case without a product or ownership decision.
